dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6854 IH: No Welfare for Non-Citizens Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Fine introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To prohibit aliens from receiving Federal public benefits, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the No Welfare for Non-Citizens Act.

subsection.header: Aliens who are not qualified aliens ineligible for Federal public benefits
subsection.text: Section 401 of the Personal Responsibility and Work Opportunity Reconciliation Act of 1996 (8 U.S.C. 1611) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a) to read as follows:

subsection.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, an alien (as defined in section 101 of the Immigration and Nationality Act), is not eligible for any Federal public benefit (as defined in subsection (c)).

paragraph.text: in subsection (c), by inserting cash assistance, after unemployment benefit,.

subsection.text: Section 431 of the Personal Responsibility and Work Opportunity Reconciliation Act of 1996 (8 U.S.C. 1641) is repealed.

subsection.header: Limited eligibility of qualified aliens for certain Federal programs
subsection.text: Section 402 of the Personal Responsibility and Work Opportunity Reconciliation Act of 1996 (8 U.S.C. 1612).

subsection.header: Repealing limited eligibility of qualified aliens
subsection.text: Section 403 of the Personal Responsibility and Work Opportunity Reconciliation Act of 1996 (8 U.S.C. 1613) is repealed.
